objective: Make production authentication, CORS, cookies, public origin, and authenticated smoke-test evidence explicit before external launch or store review.

officialBasis.name: MDN Set-Cookie
officialBasis.requirement: Production login cookies need intentional HttpOnly, Secure, Path, lifetime, and SameSite behavior. SameSite=None must be paired with Secure.

officialBasis.name: MDN Access-Control-Allow-Origin
officialBasis.requirement: Credentialed CORS must use explicit allowed origins instead of wildcard Access-Control-Allow-Origin.

officialBasis.name: Capacitor configuration
officialBasis.requirement: Native app packaging must use a stable app id, web directory, and origin/API behavior that works in the packaged WebView.

officialBasis.name: Google Play User Data policy
officialBasis.requirement: Production user data handling must match the public disclosures and use secure transmission.

officialBasis.name: Apple App Review Guidelines
officialBasis.requirement: Submitted apps must be stable, complete, and not depend on private local developer services.

runtimeValues.releaseReason: Enables production defaults and prevents local/dev assumptions.
Defines the canonical web/PWA origin used by public URLs, smoke tests, and CORS checks.
Pins authenticated API callers to the public web/PWA origin and required packaged-app origins.
Allows browser/PWA/App requests to include login cookies.
Prevents dev-only localhost origins from remaining enabled in production.
Keeps the workflow console protected before public launch.
Keeps first public release limited to controlled accounts until signup policy is ready.
Ensures login cookies are only sent over HTTPS.
Same-origin web/PWA can use Lax. Cross-origin remote API needs SameSite=None plus Secure=true.
Targets post-deploy verification at the real public domain.
Prevents a smoke test from passing if public auth is accidentally disabled.

originModels.description: Serve web/PWA and API under https://www.zkraiflow.top so login cookies are same-site and CORS remains simple.
originModels.corsPolicy: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS includes https://www.zkraiflow.top and no wildcard.

originModels.description: Packaged app WebView calls a remote API directly from a Capacitor origin.
originModels.cookiePolicy: Use SameSite=None only when required, always with Secure=true, and validate on Android/iOS devices.
originModels.corsPolicy: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS includes the actual packaged-app origins required by the WebView.

originModels.description: Web/PWA and API are deployed on different HTTPS domains.
originModels.cookiePolicy: Requires cross-site credential validation, SameSite=None, Secure=true, and CSRF review.
originModels.corsPolicy: Every accepted origin must be explicitly listed and tested with credentials.

requiredEvidence: https://www.zkraiflow.top/api/healthz returns ok=true
Health response reports authRequired=true
Root, support, legal pages, and manifest are public

smokeGates.command: SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top SMOKE_USERNAME=<account> SMOKE_PASSWORD=<secret> npm run cloud:smoke
requiredEvidence: Login returns a session cookie
/api/auth/session reports authenticated=true
Protected account/data-rights APIs work with the session
Production CORS allowlist contains https://www.zkraiflow.top
Wildcard CORS is not used for authenticated APIs
Credentialed requests work from mobile web/PWA and packaged app origins
Login remains valid after refresh on mobile web
Login remains valid after closing/reopening installed PWA
Packaged app login persists according to selected SameSite strategy
Logout clears the session
Expired sessions are rejected
Users are not silently treated as admin
Hosting platform has the required runtime values
Production profile template matches the selected public origin
No real secrets are committed to the repository
A review-safe account exists
SMOKE_USERNAME and SMOKE_PASSWORD are injected from secret storage
npm run cloud:smoke passes against https://www.zkraiflow.top
Mobile browser session works
Installed PWA session works
Android/iOS packaged app session works after native build validation

doNotCommit: Internal-only worker URLs if they reveal private network details
